stemHtml: Before take-off, a pilot receives the clearance: "CLIMB VIA ZOR 6V DEPARTURE TO FL100". This means the pilot…

options.a: must climb to FL100, comply with published level restrictions, follow the SID lateral profile, and comply with published speed restrictions or ATC speed instructions.
options.b: may climb to FL100, must comply with level restrictions, may deviate from the SID lateral profile, and must comply with speed restrictions.
options.c: is cleared to FL100, may comply with level restrictions, must follow the SID lateral profile, and may comply with speed restrictions.
options.d: must climb to FL100, may deviate from level restrictions, must follow the SID lateral profile, and must comply with speed restrictions.
